markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review SEO progress and demo GrowthX's new LLM tracking tool.](https://fathom.video/share/fC3muvgFrXcGsKLdeW-sUDPM5FP2UphQ?tab=summary&timestamp=87.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**New Tool Demoed:** GrowthX demoed CheckVet, a new platform for tracking LLM citations and competitor performance. Prophecy will receive free access.](https://fathom.video/share/fC3muvgFrXcGsKLdeW-sUDPM5FP2UphQ?tab=summary&timestamp=141.0)
  - [**Data Accuracy Blocked:** CheckVet's data is inaccurate because Prophecy is in the wrong category ("ETL") and has an outdated competitor list. This blocks all meaningful analysis.](https://fathom.video/share/fC3muvgFrXcGsKLdeW-sUDPM5FP2UphQ?tab=summary&timestamp=188.0)
  - [**New Mandate:** Raj (Prophecy) now requires reporting on just three specific LLM queries, not general SEO. This shifts the team's focus entirely.](https://fathom.video/share/fC3muvgFrXcGsKLdeW-sUDPM5FP2UphQ?tab=summary&timestamp=845.0)
  - [**Strategic Direction:** The new focus is positioning Prophecy as an Alteryx replacement by targeting key pain points like "black box" workflows and analyst-engineering backlogs.](https://fathom.video/share/fC3muvgFrXcGsKLdeW-sUDPM5FP2UphQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1173.0)

## Topics

### New Mandate: Focus on Specific LLM Queries

  - [Raj (Prophecy) has shifted focus from general SEO to performance on three specific LLM queries.](https://fathom.video/share/fC3muvgFrXcGsKLdeW-sUDPM5FP2UphQ?tab=summary&timestamp=845.0)
  - [The goal is to show results on these queries, not just publish content.](https://fathom.video/share/fC3muvgFrXcGsKLdeW-sUDPM5FP2UphQ?tab=summary&timestamp=845.0)
  - [Cody will add leading indicators from CheckVet (e.g., brand mentions) to reports to show early progress.](https://fathom.video/share/fC3muvgFrXcGsKLdeW-sUDPM5FP2UphQ?tab=summary&timestamp=952.0)

### Strategic Direction: Alteryx Replacement

  - [Prophecy's GTM strategy is now focused on replacing Alteryx.](https://fathom.video/share/fC3muvgFrXcGsKLdeW-sUDPM5FP2UphQ?tab=summary&timestamp=833.0)
  - [**Core Pain Points to Target:**](https://fathom.video/share/fC3muvgFrXcGsKLdeW-sUDPM5FP2UphQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1173.0)
      - [**"Black Box" Workflows:** Alteryx Desktop workflows are hard for engineering to reproduce in production.](https://fathom.video/share/fC3muvgFrXcGsKLdeW-sUDPM5FP2UphQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1173.0)
      - [**Analyst-Engineering Backlogs:** This "black box" → production friction creates significant delays and frustration.](https://fathom.video/share/fC3muvgFrXcGsKLdeW-sUDPM5FP2UphQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1173.0)
  - [**Prophecy's Value Proposition:**](https://fathom.video/share/fC3muvgFrXcGsKLdeW-sUDPM5FP2UphQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1266.0)
      - [Enables analysts to build production-ready workflows, eliminating backlogs.](https://fathom.video/share/fC3muvgFrXcGsKLdeW-sUDPM5FP2UphQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1266.0)
      - [**Positioning:** Lead with productivity and efficiency, not cost.](https://fathom.video/share/fC3muvgFrXcGsKLdeW-sUDPM5FP2UphQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1321.0)
      - [**Cost:** Use a new ROI calculator to justify cost to finance/procurement, but avoid price wars.](https://fathom.video/share/fC3muvgFrXcGsKLdeW-sUDPM5FP2UphQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1321.0)

### CheckVet Platform Demo

  - [Carrie demoed CheckVet, a platform for tracking LLM visibility, sentiment, and citations.](https://fathom.video/share/fC3muvgFrXcGsKLdeW-sUDPM5FP2UphQ?tab=summary&timestamp=141.0)
  - [**Key Features:**](https://fathom.video/share/fC3muvgFrXcGsKLdeW-sUDPM5FP2UphQ?tab=summary&timestamp=442.0)
      - [**Citation Tracking:** Shows which pages LLMs link to, enabling optimization.](https://fathom.video/share/fC3muvgFrXcGsKLdeW-sUDPM5FP2UphQ?tab=summary&timestamp=460.0)
      - [**Sources Page:** A "SERP-like" view showing top-cited pages in a category, revealing content opportunities.](https://fathom.video/share/fC3muvgFrXcGsKLdeW-sUDPM5FP2UphQ?tab=summary&timestamp=511.0)
      - [**Custom Prompts:** Track specific queries (e.g., the three mandated by Raj).](https://fathom.video/share/fC3muvgFrXcGsKLdeW-sUDPM5FP2UphQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)
  - [**Access:** Prophecy will receive free access for up to one year, starting in mid-February.](https://fathom.video/share/fC3muvgFrXcGsKLdeW-sUDPM5FP2UphQ?tab=summary&timestamp=605.0)

### CheckVet Setup & Data Accuracy

  - [CheckVet's data is currently inaccurate, blocking analysis.](https://fathom.video/share/fC3muvgFrXcGsKLdeW-sUDPM5FP2UphQ?tab=summary&timestamp=188.0)
  - [**Root Causes:**](https://fathom.video/share/fC3muvgFrXcGsKLdeW-sUDPM5FP2UphQ?tab=summary&timestamp=188.0)
      - [**Incorrect Category:** Prophecy is listed under "ETL," not the target "Data Prep" or "Alteryx Replacement."](https://fathom.video/share/fC3muvgFrXcGsKLdeW-sUDPM5FP2UphQ?tab=summary&timestamp=771.0)
      - [**Outdated Competitor List:** The list includes irrelevant tools (e.g., Matillion) and omits key targets.](https://fathom.video/share/fC3muvgFrXcGsKLdeW-sUDPM5FP2UphQ?tab=summary&timestamp=689.0)
  - [**Impact:** The platform cannot generate meaningful insights until these inputs are corrected.](https://fathom.video/share/fC3muvgFrXcGsKLdeW-sUDPM5FP2UphQ?tab=summary&timestamp=188.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Carrie:**](https://fathom.video/share/fC3muvgFrXcGsKLdeW-sUDPM5FP2UphQ?tab=summary&timestamp=315.0)
      - [Send Prophecy a list of available CheckVet categories to select a primary.](https://fathom.video/share/fC3muvgFrXcGsKLdeW-sUDPM5FP2UphQ?tab=summary&timestamp=315.0)
      - [Add the three mandated LLM queries as custom prompts in CheckVet.](https://fathom.video/share/fC3muvgFrXcGsKLdeW-sUDPM5FP2UphQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)
  - [**Cody:**](https://fathom.video/share/fC3muvgFrXcGsKLdeW-sUDPM5FP2UphQ?tab=summary&timestamp=689.0)
      - [Review the CheckVet competitor list with the ISR team and provide updates.](https://fathom.video/share/fC3muvgFrXcGsKLdeW-sUDPM5FP2UphQ?tab=summary&timestamp=689.0)
  - [**GrowthX Team:**](https://fathom.video/share/fC3muvgFrXcGsKLdeW-sUDPM5FP2UphQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1039.0)
      - [Develop content strategy for the three LLM queries, leveraging the Alteryx replacement narrative.](https://fathom.video/share/fC3muvgFrXcGsKLdeW-sUDPM5FP2UphQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1039.0)
